testcase.name: TC16 - Commercial Space supports sub-type filter and sort by price high to low
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page................passed When the user clicks the Buy heading........................................passed And the user clicks "Commercial Space in Mumbai"............................passed And the user switches to the new tab........................................passed And the user clicks the Business Type filter................................passed And the user selects the first business sub-type option.....................passed And the user clicks the sort dropdown.......................................passed And the user selects "Price - High to Low" sort option......................passed Then the prices of the first 5 commercial properties should be displayed....passed
